description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ocaml/opam2:latest Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. Add a global before_script that runs sudo apt-get -y install m4 pkg-config libssl-dev libffi-dev, opam init, eval `opam config env`, opam update, opam pin add ppx_deriving_yojson --dev-repo -n, and opam pin add disml . In the build stage add a build job that runs only on the master branch and merge requests and executes echo "Build successful". In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on tags, runs opam pin add odoc --dev-repo, dune build @doc, copies the generated documentation with cp -r _build/default/_doc/_html/ public/, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact. The pipeline should deploy the documentation via GitLab Pages.
